figures.caption: Figure 2: Howmany times more likely AnalysisAgent is to succeed compared to baselines, per LLM backend (circles) and pooled across all LLMs (diamonds). Values above 1 mean AnalysisAgent succeeds more often; 1 means equal odds.
Figure 3: Average verified success rate by analysis tool and agent, aggregated over all LLM backends.
Table 5: Analysis output statistics of successful AnalysisAgent runs (377/420). IQR=interquartile range (Q1–Q3) reduces outlier influence; median shown for metrics and time.
Figure 4: Root-cause failure categories by agent (%).
Figure 5: Resource consumption by agent and LLM backend.
